subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter of 2 Ramadan 1332 was received, testifying to thy humility and reverence before the Abha Kingdom.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه دوم رمضان ۱۳۳۲ وصول یافت مضمون تبتل و تضرع بملکوت ابهی
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @exhortations and counsels, @firmness in the Covenant, @growth of the Cause, @universal peace; world unity, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
